reference: Hepatitis C symptoms involving blood found in both vomit and fecal matter. I am a thirty-nine-year-old male who is hepatitis C positive and currently still active in my addiction to methamphetamine. I have recently, seven days ago to be exact, started having sharp pains in my liver which brings on bouts of extreme nausea. When I do vomit from the pain, there has been enough blood in it to cause me great concern. The same in my stool, but only in the past three days. What should I do?
